---
title: "checkUpkeep (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_init: feeAggregator = s_feeAggregator, auctions = s_allowlistedAssets.values()
    q_init --> q_iter: for i in 0..auctions.length
    q_iter --> q_skip: assetParams.decimals == 0
    q_skip --> q_iter: continue (next i)
    q_iter --> q_get_price: assetParams.decimals != 0
    q_get_price --> q_check_assetout: asset == s_assetOut
    q_check_assetout --> q_set_valid: isAssetOutPriceValid = isPriceValid
    q_set_valid --> q_check_live: check auctionStart
    q_get_price --> q_check_live: asset != s_assetOut
    q_check_live --> q_check_ended: auctionStart != 0
    q_check_ended --> q_end_auction: duration elapsed OR (isPriceValid AND balanceUsd below minAuctionSize)
    q_end_auction --> q_iter: endedAuctions[idx++] = asset
    q_check_ended --> q_iter: auction still live
    q_check_live --> q_check_eligible: auctionStart == 0 AND isPriceValid
    q_check_eligible --> q_add_eligible: availableAssetUsdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_add_eligible --> q_iter: eligibleAssets[idx++] = AssetAmount(asset, balance)
    q_check_eligible --> q_iter: availableAssetUsdValue below minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_check_live --> q_iter: auctionStart == 0 AND !isPriceValid
    q_iter --> q_finalize: loop complete
    q_finalize --> q_clear_eligible: !isAssetOutPriceValid
    q_clear_eligible --> q_encode: eligibleAssetsIdx = 0
    q_finalize --> q_encode: isAssetOutPriceValid
    q_encode --> q_return_true: eligibleAssetsIdx > 0 OR endedAuctionsIdx > 0
    q_return_true --> [*]: return (true, abi.encode(eligibleAssets, endedAuctions))
    q_encode --> q_return_false: eligibleAssetsIdx == 0 AND endedAuctionsIdx == 0
    q_return_false --> [*]: return (false, empty)

    note right of q_check_ended
        INV-001: Auction is ended if duration elapsed OR remaining balance below minAuctionSizeUsd (dust guard)
        INV-002: Asset out price validity gates all new auction starts
    end note

    note right of q_check_eligible
        INV-003: Only assets with valid price AND no live auction AND balance above minAuctionSizeUsd are eligible
    end note

---
title: "performUpkeep (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_decode: decode performData into eligibleAssets, endedAuctions
    q_decode --> q_get_out_price: eligibleAssets.length > 0
    q_get_out_price --> q_check_fee_agg: assetOutPrice = _getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)
    q_decode --> q_check_fee_agg: eligibleAssets.length == 0
    q_check_fee_agg --> q_transfer_funds: hasFeeAggregator AND eligibleAssets.length > 0
    q_transfer_funds --> q_iter_eligible: feeAggregator.transferForSwap(this, eligibleAssets)
    q_check_fee_agg --> q_iter_eligible: !hasFeeAggregator OR eligibleAssets.length == 0
    q_iter_eligible --> q_check_live: for i in 0..eligibleAssets.length
    q_check_live --> q_revert_live: s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0
    q_revert_live --> [*]: revert LiveAuction()
    q_check_live --> q_check_params: s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0
    q_check_params --> q_revert_params: assetDecimals == 0
    q_revert_params --> [*]: revert AssetParamsNotSet(asset)
    q_check_params --> q_get_asset_price: assetDecimals != 0
    q_get_asset_price --> q_check_min_size: get asset price
    q_check_min_size --> q_revert_size: availableAssetUsdValue below minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_revert_size --> [*]: revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize
    q_check_min_size --> q_is_assetout: availableAssetUsdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_is_assetout --> q_transfer_out: asset == s_assetOut
    q_transfer_out --> q_iter_eligible: transfer full balance to assetOutReceiver
    q_is_assetout --> q_start_auction: asset != s_assetOut
    q_start_auction --> q_iter_eligible: s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp, emit AuctionStarted
    q_iter_eligible --> q_iter_ended: eligible loop complete
    q_iter_ended --> q_check_ended_valid: for i in 0..endedAuctions.length
    q_check_ended_valid --> q_revert_invalid: s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0
    q_revert_invalid --> [*]: revert InvalidAuction(asset)
    q_check_ended_valid --> q_end_auction: s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0
    q_end_auction --> q_iter_ended: _onAuctionEnd(asset), delete s_auctionStarts[asset], emit AuctionEnded
    q_iter_ended --> [*]: ended loop complete

    note right of q_start_auction
        INV-001: Only non-assetOut assets with no live auction can start new auctions
        INV-002: auctionStart is set to block.timestamp on start
        INV-003: Funds are pulled from feeAggregator before auction starts
    end note

    note right of q_end_auction
        INV-004: Ended auction must have non-zero auctionStart
        INV-005: auctionStart is deleted on end
    end note

---
title: "bid (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_reentrancy: check s_entered
    q_reentrancy --> q_revert_reentrant: s_entered == true
    q_revert_reentrant --> [*]: revert ReentrantCall()
    q_reentrancy --> q_lock: s_entered == false
    q_lock --> q_load: s_entered = true
    q_load --> q_check_auction: load assetParams, auctionStart, elapsedTime
    q_check_auction --> q_revert_invalid: auctionStart == 0 OR elapsedTime > auctionDuration
    q_revert_invalid --> [*]: revert InvalidAuction(asset)
    q_check_auction --> q_get_price: auction is live
    q_get_price --> q_check_bid_value: assetPrice = _getAssetPrice(asset, true)
    q_check_bid_value --> q_revert_low: bidUsdValue below minBidUsdValue
    q_revert_low --> [*]: revert BidValueTooLow
    q_check_bid_value --> q_check_balance: bidUsdValue >= minBidUsdValue
    q_check_balance --> q_revert_high: amount > availableBalance
    q_revert_high --> [*]: revert BidAmountTooHigh
    q_check_balance --> q_compute: amount <= availableBalance
    q_compute --> q_transfer_out: assetOutAmount = _getAssetOutAmount(...)
    q_transfer_out --> q_callback: transfer asset to msg.sender
    q_callback --> q_pull: data.length != 0, call auctionCallback
    q_transfer_out --> q_pull: data.length == 0
    q_pull --> q_emit: transferFrom(msg.sender, this, assetOutAmount)
    q_emit --> q_unlock: emit AuctionBidSettled
    q_unlock --> [*]: s_entered = false

    note right of q_transfer_out
        INV-001: Asset is transferred to bidder BEFORE assetOut is pulled (flash-loan pattern)
        INV-002: Reentrancy guard via s_entered flag protects against callback exploitation
        INV-003: bidUsdValue must meet minBidUsdValue threshold
    end note

    note right of q_compute
        INV-004: assetOutAmount computed via linear price decay curve
        INV-005: amount must not exceed contract balance of asset
    end note

stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_check_empty: adds.length == 0 and removes.length == 0?
    q_check_empty --> q_revert_empty: true
    q_revert_empty --> [*]: revert EmptyList()
    q_check_empty --> q_remove_loop: false

    q_remove_loop --> q_remove_hook: for i in 0..removes.length
    q_remove_hook --> q_remove_allowlist: _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset, true)
    q_remove_allowlist --> q_revert_not_allowed: !s_allowlistedAssets.remove(asset)
    q_revert_not_allowed --> [*]: revert AssetNotAllowlisted(asset)
    q_remove_allowlist --> q_cleanup: removed successfully
    q_cleanup --> q_emit_remove: delete feedIdToAsset, feedInfo, dataStreamsPrice
    q_emit_remove --> q_remove_loop: emit AssetRemovedFromAllowlist(asset), next i
    q_remove_loop --> q_add_loop: all removes done

    q_add_loop --> q_add_hook: for i in 0..adds.length
    q_add_hook --> q_check_asset: _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset, false)
    q_check_asset --> q_revert_zero_addr: asset == address(0)
    q_revert_zero_addr --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroAddress()
    q_check_asset --> q_check_config: asset != address(0)
    q_check_config --> q_revert_zero_val: stalenessThreshold == 0 or (feedId == 0 and dataFeed == address(0))
    q_revert_zero_val --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroValue()
    q_check_config --> q_check_streams: valid config

    q_check_streams --> q_validate_streams: dataStreamsFeedId != bytes32(0)
    q_check_streams --> q_update_allowlist: dataStreamsFeedId == bytes32(0), skip streams validation

    q_validate_streams --> q_revert_decimals: dataStreamsFeedDecimals == 0
    q_revert_decimals --> [*]: revert InvalidFeedDecimals(feedId)
    q_validate_streams --> q_check_version: decimals > 0
    q_check_version --> q_revert_version: version != 3
    q_revert_version --> [*]: revert InvalidFeedVersion(feedId, version)
    q_check_version --> q_check_rotation: version == 3

    q_check_rotation --> q_handle_rotation: previousAsset != address(0) and previousAsset != asset
    q_check_rotation --> q_set_mapping: no rotation needed
    q_handle_rotation --> q_revert_no_fallback: previousAsset.usdDataFeed == address(0)
    q_revert_no_fallback --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroValue()
    q_handle_rotation --> q_clear_prev: previousAsset has usdDataFeed fallback
    q_clear_prev --> q_set_mapping: clear previousAsset streams state

    q_set_mapping --> q_update_allowlist: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] = asset

    q_update_allowlist --> q_emit_add: s_allowlistedAssets.add(asset) == true (new)
    q_emit_add --> q_store_feed: emit AssetAddedToAllowlist(asset)
    q_update_allowlist --> q_check_feedid_change: already allowlisted
    q_check_feedid_change --> q_cleanup_old: existingFeedId != newFeedId
    q_cleanup_old --> q_store_feed: delete old feedIdToAsset and dataStreamsPrice
    q_check_feedid_change --> q_store_feed: feedId unchanged

    q_store_feed --> q_emit_updated: s_feedInfo[asset] = feedInfo
    q_emit_updated --> q_add_loop: emit FeedInfoUpdated(asset, feedInfo), next i
    q_add_loop --> [*]: all adds done

    note right of q_check_rotation
        INV-001: feed ID rotation preserves price source for previous asset (requires usdDataFeed fallback)
        INV-002: each dataStreamsFeedId maps to exactly one asset
    end note

    note right of q_validate_streams
        INV-003: only Data Streams report v3 is supported
        INV-004: dataStreamsFeedDecimals must be non-zero when streams feed is configured
    end note

    note right of q_check_config
        INV-005: at least one price source required (dataStreamsFeedId or usdDataFeed)
        INV-006: stalenessThreshold must be non-zero
    end note

---
title: "_getAssetPrice (PriceManager)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_load: priceInfo = s_dataStreamsPrice[asset], feedInfo = s_feedInfo[asset]
    q_load --> q_init: price = priceInfo.usdPrice, updatedAt = priceInfo.timestamp
    q_init --> q_check_stale: minTimestamp = block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold

    q_check_stale --> q_check_datafeed: updatedAt < minTimestamp (streams price stale)
    q_check_stale --> q_validate: updatedAt >= minTimestamp (streams price fresh)

    q_check_datafeed --> q_validate: usdDataFeed == address(0) (no fallback configured)
    q_check_datafeed --> q_fetch_feed: usdDataFeed != address(0)

    q_fetch_feed --> q_compare_ts: (answer, dataFeedUpdatedAt) = usdDataFeed.latestRoundData()
    q_compare_ts --> q_validate: updatedAt >= dataFeedUpdatedAt (streams more recent)
    q_compare_ts --> q_use_feed: updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt (feed more recent)

    q_use_feed --> q_scale_feed: price = answer.toUint256(), updatedAt = dataFeedUpdatedAt
    q_scale_feed --> q_scale_up: decimals < 18
    q_scale_feed --> q_scale_down: decimals > 18
    q_scale_feed --> q_validate: decimals == 18
    q_scale_up --> q_validate: price = price * 10^(18 - decimals)
    q_scale_down --> q_validate: price = price / 10^(decimals - 18)

    q_validate --> q_compute_valid: isZero = (price == 0), isStale = (updatedAt < minTimestamp)
    q_compute_valid --> q_check_validation: isValid = !isZero and !isStale

    q_check_validation --> q_revert_zero: withValidation and isZero
    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert ZeroFeedData()
    q_check_validation --> q_revert_stale: withValidation and isStale
    q_revert_stale --> [*]: revert StaleFeedData()
    q_check_validation --> [*]: return (price, updatedAt, isValid)

    note right of q_check_stale
        INV-001: Data Streams price is always prioritized over Data Feed price
        INV-002: fallback to Data Feed only when streams price is stale AND feed is configured
        INV-003: between stale streams and data feed, the most recent timestamp wins
    end note

    note right of q_validate
        INV-004: returned price is always scaled to 18 decimals
        INV-005: isValid == true iff price != 0 and updatedAt >= block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold
        INV-006: negative data feed answer reverts via SafeCast.toUint256()
    end note
